name: landing-page-review
description: Use this skill when asked to review, improve, or polish a simple landing page or static web page.
---

# Landing Page Review Skill

Use this skill when the user asks to improve a simple landing page.

## Goal

Improve the page while keeping it beginner-friendly, readable, and dependency-free.

## Review checklist

When reviewing or improving the page, check for:

1. Clear page purpose
2. Strong and simple headline
3. Helpful supporting text
4. Clear call to action
5. Semantic HTML structure
6. Basic accessibility
7. Mobile-friendly layout
8. Simple CSS
9. No unnecessary frameworks or dependencies

## Output expectations

When you make or suggest changes:

- Keep the page simple.
- Explain the changes in plain English.
- Mention which checklist items were improved.
- Do not introduce a build step.
- Do not add external libraries.
